---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new program, preset, task type, or capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to add or change?

A clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Type of contribution

- [ ] New US benefits program (e.g., LIHEAP, CHIP, TANF, Section 8/HCV, SSI)
- [ ] New state preset for an existing program (e.g., `snap.ny`, `medicaid.ca`)
- [ ] New task type (e.g., `policy_qa`, `form`, `agentic`, `comparative`)
- [ ] New output format or formatter
- [ ] CLI improvement
- [ ] Evaluation / scoring improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## For new program requests — policy source

If you're requesting a new benefits program, please provide:

- Program name and administering agency:
- Relevant CFR section(s):
- Link to income/asset threshold tables:
- Link to eligibility rules:
- Fiscal year calendar (federal FY Oct–Sep, or calendar year, or other):

## Why is this useful for LLM evaluation?

What reasoning patterns or policy edge cases does this enable testing?

## Are you willing to contribute this yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a PR
- [ ] No, but I'd be happy to help review
- [ ] No
